name: Box Content Management
description: Files, folders, search, metadata, sharing, comments, collaborations via Box's official MCP

env_vars.description: Box OAuth2 Access Token or Developer Token for API access
env_vars.how_to_set: app.box.com/developers/console → My Apps → your app → Configuration → Developer Token → Generate. For production, use OAuth2 flow: developer.box.com/guides/authentication/oauth2

tools.name: search_content
tools.description: Search for files, folders, and web links across all accessible Box content by keyword, type, or metadata

query.description: Search query string to match against file names and content

type.description: Filter by item type: file, folder, or web_link

ancestor_folder_ids.description: Limit search to specific folder IDs and their subfolders

tools.name: list_folder_items
tools.description: List all files and subfolders within a Box folder with name, size, modified date, and permissions

folder_id.description: The Box folder ID (use '0' for the root folder)

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default 100, max 1000)

sort.description: Sort field: name, date, or size

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Retrieve detailed metadata for a file including size, versions, tags, shared links, and collaborations

file_id.description: The Box file ID to retrieve information for

tools.name: create_shared_link
tools.description: Create or update a shared link for a file or folder with access level, password, and expiration settings

item_id.description: The file or folder ID to create the shared link for

item_type.description: Type of item: file or folder

access.description: Access level: open, company, or collaborators

password.description: Optional password to protect the shared link

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Box file, optionally tagging users with @mentions

file_id.description: The file ID to add the comment to
